sheet_name: แปลนโครงสร้างหลังคา, ขยาย 1
source_image: image/บ้าน_เล็ก_2ชั้น_03/บ้าน_เล็ก_2ชั้น_03_หน้า35.png
view_title: แปลนโครงสร้างหลังคา 1:100 + ขยาย 1 (hanger detail) 1:20
grid_source: raw_json_ตัวที่ใช้งานจริง/05บ้าน_เล็ก_2ชั้น_03/บ้าน_เล็ก_2ชั้น_03_หน้า00_gridline.json
schema_note: roof_plan is a draft pattern per spec section 1 (#12) -- light-gauge cold-formed steel, not rebar.

steel_members.spacing_note: one rafter at every grid column position (1,2,3,4), running full length E to B

steel_members.thai_name: ละพานรับจันทันเหล็ก

roof_plan_extent: grid E to grid B only (does not extend to gridF or gridA) -- matches S-06's tie-beam plan which also only spans E-A, further confirming grid F and the area south of grid A are single-story/non-roofed extensions of the main 2-story block
detail_reference: ขยาย 1 (hanger detail, referenced via 'ดูขยาย1' callout at grid4-gridB) -- เหล็กหางปลาขนาด 50x300x6.00mm ฝังในเสาคอนกรีต, จันทันเหล็กเชื่อมติดกับเหล็กหางปลาตลอดแนวสัมผัส -- same wording as houses #2-#4's equivalent detail
warnings: IMPORTANT finding: unlike house #4 (which used the SAME profile for both rafter and purlin, C-100x50x20x3.2mm/5.5kg/m for both), this house uses DIFFERENT profiles: rafter is the larger C-125x50x20x4.0mm (7.50kg/m) while purlin is the smaller C-100x50x20x3.2mm (5.50kg/m) -- matching houses #2/#3's convention of distinct rafter vs purlin sizing, not house #4's unusual shared-profile design. Confirms house #4's shared-profile roof was a house-specific design choice, not a project-wide convention.
Only x-axis overhangs (1.30m each side) printed on this sheet, no y-axis overhang -- same pattern as houses #3/#4.

Roof plan's y-extent (gridE to gridB, 9.60m) matches S-06's tie-beam plan extent exactly (also E to B) -- both confirm grid F and the area south of grid A are outside the main 2-story roofed volume (likely a single-story carport/utility extension, consistent with the dummy-grid discrepancy flagged on S-04/S-05/S-06).
